objective_chain.description: Use the exposed diagnostics trail to locate rollback data that should remain internal.

hints: The main application surface is not obviously vulnerable in this variant.
A leaked diagnostics path exposes rollout data that should not be public.
The final answer is reachable through that misplaced operational surface.
